SELECT value, acos(value) AS arc_cosine FROM test_acos WHERE value BETWEEN -1.0 AND 1.0;
SELECT value, acos(value) AS arc_cosine FROM test_acos WHERE value IN (0.0, 1.0, -1.0);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT acos(value) FROM test_acos WHERE value BETWEEN -1 AND 1) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_values (id UInt32, value Float32);
INSERT INTO test_values SELECT number AS id, (RAND() * 2 - 1) AS value FROM system.numbers LIMIT 100;
SELECT id, value, acos(value) AS arc_cosine FROM test_values WHERE value BETWEEN -1.0 AND 1.0;
SELECT SUM(acos(value)) AS total_acos FROM test_acos WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value BETWEEN -1 AND 1;
CREATE TABLE test_nested (id UInt32, value Float32);
SELECT (SELECT AVG(acos(value)) FROM test_nested WHERE value BETWEEN -1 AND 1) AS average_acos;
SELECT n.id, acos(n.value) AS arc_cosine FROM test_nested AS n JOIN (SELECT value FROM test_values WHERE value BETWEEN -1 AND 1) AS v ON n.value = v.value;
SELECT COUNT(acos(value)) AS valid_acos_count FROM test_acos WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
